description_long: This object is a firearm with a classic design, featuring a wooden stock and foregrip paired with a matte black metal receiver and barrel. The stock and foregrip are made of a medium-brown wood with visible grain, giving the weapon a traditional appearance. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a simple front sight and no visible ribbing or venting. The receiver is robust and boxy, with a prominent magazine protruding below, suggesting a repeating action. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a standard trigger, with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement. The overall construction appears solid and functional, suitable for use in urban environments where durability and reliability are important.
description: A traditional shotgun with a wooden stock and foregrip, matte black metal receiver, and a long barrel. The design is robust and functional, with a classic appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, foregrip, and the length of the black barrel and receiver.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel opening and the alignment of the wooden foregrip and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, trigger guard, and the full length of the wooden and metal components.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden stock and the straight alignment of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, enclosing the trigger with no visible reinforcement or finger grooves
